verification_gate: meta git cuts a branch from origin/main and opens a PR to develop with checks; no long-lived-branch force-push or rebase; superset upgrade-only respected.
proof_summary: The meta_git_cli fleet git surface is installed and functional read-only. `meta project list` enumerates the full fleet (30+ peer repos: agent, beads_rust, envctl, handoff, lifeos, meta_git_cli, meta_git_lib, ...). `meta git status` runs across every peer and reports per-repo branch/tracking/dirty state (e.g. meta on main up-to-date with one modified .kb/config.toml; agent on codex/... clean; handoff, beads_rust, ccboard clean). This proves the branch/PR surface is wired and safe to drive. The write half of the gate -- cutting a feature branch from origin/main and OPENING A PR to develop with checks -- was NOT executed: this lane is read-only and explicitly forbidden from creating branches/PRs (see remaining/blocker). No long-lived-branch force-push or rebase was performed (none attempted).

blockers.gate: meta git cuts a branch from origin/main and opens a PR to develop with checks
blockers.detail: Requires a real write flow (branch creation + push + PR open + CI checks) against fleet remotes. This lane is READ-ONLY and forbidden from creating branches or PRs; it also may not commit anywhere. The surface is proven functional (project list + git status across the fleet), but the PR-cutting gate needs a commit/PR-authorized session.
blockers.owner_action: In a commit-authorized session: `meta git checkout -b <feature> origin/main` across the scoped peers, push, open a PR targeting develop (never main directly; develop->main is fast-forward only per git-topology), and confirm checks. Abandon the test branch/PR per the row rollback plan.

live_commands.purpose: install-via-profile: meta is a nix-profile symlink

output: ok . (meta): On branch main, up to date with origin/main; modified .kb/config.toml
